lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Say, aren't you a bit tall for a dwarf?

lines.speaker: Tombar
lines.text: Was there anything in particular you wanted?

lines.speaker: Tombar
lines.text: I have nothing to do for you, I'm afraid. Ask around town, though, there are always people who need some work done around here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I just like talking to strangers.
